policy: All UI icons, fonts, the MediaPipe runtime and the AIR-DROW hand-model task bundle are local. No build-time or runtime hand-model download is permitted. Hand calibration and tracking health run locally unless the user explicitly sends a sketch to AI.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Smart Shape 2.0, Workspace Navigator, Loading Experience, Performance Guard and Hand Calibration run locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by local SVG assets

releaseStatus: v5.0.6 publishes the fully local MediaPipe bundle as JavaScript, normalizes the WASM base URL and shows the exact engine-start diagnostic if initialization fails.
